value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-07-04 release-health verified live: git tag v2026.7.4 exists and npm view @unbrained/pm-cli version = 2026.7.4 (latest advanced). Today's merges to main (PR #428 head + close-message fallback d3e37991) will ride the next daily cut once [Unreleased] is non-empty.

patch.value:
## Procedure (run after any merge to main)
1. Next day (or after the daily workflow window), check: `gh run list --workflow=auto-release` → latest run green.
2. Confirm a new tag vYYYY.M.D exists AND `npm view @unbrained/pm-cli version` advanced to match (both must hold — tagging without publish has happened).
3. If either failed: inspect the run log; known past failure modes are (a) padded-vs-unpadded month in the changelog-match step silently skipping the release (fixed 2026-05-28), (b) publish/Sentry-gate step failing post-tag (needs SENTRY auth token in release env), (c) missing issues:write permission (fixed PR#364). RELEASE_PAT is configured — auto-release is currently healthy (2026-07-04: v2026.7.4 cut).

## Why a Reminder item
The release train fails SILENTLY (empty [Unreleased] or a skipped match just means "no release"), so a standing recurring check is the only reliable detection. Keep this item OPEN permanently; log each verification as a note/comment here instead of closing.

value.author: claude-code-agent

Also filed UX follow-up pm-w86l for a package script alias after duplicate-safe search.
